arts.sum: Lazio are unbeaten in nine of their last 10 Serie A games against Torino (W5 D4), keeping clean sheets in the two most recent ones – the only win for the Granata in that period dates to 22 April 2023 (1-0 at Biancocelesti’s home); Lazio could record three clean sheets in a row against the Granata in the tournament for the first time since 1971-73. Lazio have not lost any of their last five away games against Torino in the league (W3 D2), already a record run for the Biancocelesti against the Granata away from home in Serie A, not conceding a goal in the two most recent games.

arts.ttl: Torino manager Vanoli focused on growth ahead of Lazio clash
arts.sum: As Torino prepare to face Lazio in their upcoming Serie A match, manager Paolo Vanoli addressed the media in a pre-match press conference. The Granata are looking to bounce back after their Coppa Italia defeat against Empoli and continue their positive momentum in the league. Vanoli began by emphasizing the importance of the match against Lazio, stating, “Torino must always be ready, we know we are facing a team that is doing very well at the moment, we saw it in the Europa League. arts.ttl: Serie A | Torino v Lazio: Match Preview
arts.sum: The Stadio Olimpico Grande Torino is set to host a captivating Serie A encounter on Sunday as league leaders Torino welcome Lazio in a match that could have significant implications for both teams’ seasons. Torino have been the revelation of the Serie A season so far, sitting atop the table after five rounds. Under new manager Paolo Vanoli, the Granata have exceeded all expectations, remaining unbeaten in the league with three wins and two draws.
